payload.answer: I couldn’t save the article because the provided fetch result was a 404 network error, and there is no article content to remember. I can only note that you wanted to remember a missing/ambiguous article URL as useful for memory architecture if you provide a valid URL or the article text.

entity_resolution.reason: The article could not be fetched due to the provided mock result: 404 network error. The URL is also malformed/ambiguous as written, so no durable article content can be committed.

details: No source claims were inferred or invented.

repair_options: Provide a valid URL for the article.
Paste the article text or a summary you want remembered.
Clarify whether the note to remember is only that this missing article was considered useful for memory architecture.
